mission.title: knative: Feature Request: Support Downward API
mission.description: Feature Request: Support Downward API. Requested by 6+ users.

steps.title: Check current knative deployment
steps.description:
Verify your knative version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative
helm list -n knative 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working knative installation.

steps.title: Review knative configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant knative configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative
kubectl get configmap -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=knative
```
## In what area(s)?

## Describe the feature

There are many use-cases for knowing information about a particular revision from within the user container.

steps.title: Use FieldRef in Knative Service specs
steps.description:
Knative Serving supports the Kubernetes Downward API via `fieldRef` in container environment variables. You can reference pod metadata fields:
```yaml
apiVersion: serving.knative.dev/v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
        - image: my-image:latest
          env:
            - name: POD_NAME
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: metadata.name
            - name: POD_NAMESPACE
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: metadata.namespace
            - name: SERVICE_ACCOUNT
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: spec.serviceAccountName
```
Supported fieldRef fields are `metadata.name`, `metadata.namespace`, and `spec.serviceAccountName`. Projected volumes with downwardAPI are also supported in newer versions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative
kubectl get events -n knative --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Feature Request: Support Downward API" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Knative Serving added support for Kubernetes Downward API FieldRef in container specs. Supported fields include metadata.name, metadata.namespace, and spec.serviceAccountName. This was implemented in PR #8126 (FieldRef support) and later expanded in PR #13896 (projected volumes with downwardAPI).

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with knative installed or the issue environment reproducible.
